# PERF-231 positive: pem.Decode on hot sign path
lang: go
file: PERF-231-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "encoding/pem"

func SignPDF(doc []byte, pemBytes []byte) []byte {
	block, _ := pem.Decode(pemBytes)
	if block == nil {
		return doc
	}
	// Would parse key and sign; decode on every call is the smell.
	_ = block
	return doc
}
